revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]新しいページ: 「[[20世紀]]に活動した[[日本]]の[[建築家]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{デフォルトソート:20せいきにほんのけんちくか}} Cat…」
revision.text:
[[20世紀]]に活動した[[日本]]の[[建築家]]に関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:20せいきにほんのけんちくか}} [[Category:20世紀の建築家|にほん]] [[Category:日本の建築家]]

[[20世紀]]に活動した[[日本]]の[[建築家]]に関するカテゴリ。 {{Catlink|19世紀日本の建築家|21世紀日本の建築家}}
{{デフォルトソート:20せいきにほんのけんちくか}} [[Category:20世紀の建築家|にほん]] [[Category:日本の建築家]] [[Category:近代建築]] [[Category:現代建築]]

revision.comment: adding template
revision.text: {{Architects by nationality and century category header}}

revision.comment: 一部カテゴリを変更。
1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text: {{Architects by nationality and century category header}}

revision.comment: Bot: update category metadata
revision.text:
[[Category:Existing categories confirmed with Wikidata]] [[ja:Category:20世紀日本の建築家]] [[ar:Category:معماريون يابانيون في القرن 20]] [[azb:Category:۲۰. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو معمارلار]] [[es:Category:Arquitectos de Japón del siglo XX]] [[fa:Category:معماران سده ۲۰ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Architecte japonais du XXe siècle]] [[gl:Category:Arquitectos do Xapón do século XX]] [[it:Category:Architetti giapponesi del XX secolo]]
This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[Kōzō Nihonmatsu]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "↵(2025-05-" to " =="
Text replacement - "): (Bot: update category metadata)" to "== "
Text replacement - "This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was confirmed from JA→Wikidata links on "
Text replacement - "|comment=Imported full ja history}}" to "}}"
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "Made Tier 1 Categories" to "Tier 1 Categories"
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "[[日本]]" to "[[Japan]]"
Text replacement - "Z==↵" to "Zo== [[Category:Floating Z headings[["
Text replacement - "[[Category:Floating Z headings[[" to "[[Category:Floating Z headings]][["
Bot: overwrite with content from en‑wiki

revision.comment: Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6186150)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories missing wikidata old]]"
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q6186150)
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages]]" to "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[:en:{{subst:FULLPAGENAME}}]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Enwiki overwritten pages|" to "[[Category:qq|"
Text replacement - "Categories missing wikidata" to "qq"
Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Qq old]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
